textByHash.0d5fde2143daa92300f86b2940f54c91ddcce69f: If you ever lose your shield, come back to me to reclaim it.
textByHash.11d0117bc558e8ea2c84a71a902718ab68dd7c15: mole should now be easier to locate and it will drop noted skins and claws.
textByHash.20350bfb0800edc12f336cdebc54a8bae4c2e7c1: If you complete all of the easy tasks in Falador, the shield can restore one quarter of your prayer points once per day and you can access a shortcut to the Chaos temple from Burthorpe.
textByHash.295ee4192a9b7b2fabe43c29ba0fc14e1b7a4696: This shield is a symbol of your exploration of Falador. It can restore one quarter of your prayer points once per day and you can now access a shortcut to the Chaos temple from Burthorpe.
textByHash.2d83f959afa65f5c6d3a4d834c81f06e51403b1d: I've upgraded your Falador shield for you. The tree patch in Falador park will now never become diseased and the shield will restore all of your prayer points twice per day in addition to an increased chance at
textByHash.41ef3561acc20b617a9459cfa5ec36e6b24f11c0: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in Falador! Here's your reward!
textByHash.63381cb726bac308224c3e073364f5de50f4e020: Just complete the tasks in the Falador area so they're ticked off, then come and speak to me for your rewards.
textByHash.7b817684da16b71db24d4bfdda17049174025768: I've upgraded your Falador shield for you. It will restore all of your prayer points once per day, you can now access a bank deposit box at the crafting guild and a shortcut to the Heroes' Guild fountain. The Giant
textByHash.86a7834869b5e77902d193ae244ba12798500b30: mole becomes much easier to locate and it will drop noted skins and claws.
textByHash.86ba5ccd65db9b3cf2836d6ef849b2770e23841d: In addition to the easy rewards, the shield can restore half of your prayer points once per day and provides a 10% experience boost at Falador farm. You'll get an increased chance of finding a clue scroll from a Guard
textByHash.8e099187a868e3b6eca57bf212d856fe987d09a6: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!
textByHash.934b6bb329cc6262871df02d8dad4d2e3e4ecbed: In addition to the easy and medium benefits, the shield will restore all of your prayer points once per day, you can access a bank deposit box at the crafting guild and a shortcut to the Heroes' Guild fountain. The Giant
textByHash.b43fff4c0ba8cfc3a4340025f20224027f83f223: I'm Sir Rebral of the White Knights and taskmaster for the Falador Achievement Diary.
textByHash.c3d5b26c927ba0523c8ca4834093a2be69f3dae9: and can access a shortcut within the Motherlode Mine
textByHash.ca64dc2762531723f270ebfeb7a0717ec1d4c1e6: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.
textByHash.d44dab3ed9acba67b09b48960b24e3df3b234e1b: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, the tree patch in Falador park will never become diseased and the shield will restore all of your prayer points twice per day in addition to an increased chance at higher level
textByHash.dc341d8e30140bfb9cb9011e82b93de9a93381eb: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In Falador and the surrounding area it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will
textByHash.dc42ca5f8f29a90b5b82a257678d82246ec6d0f8: I've upgraded your Falador shield for you. It can restore half of your prayer points once per day and provides a 10% experience boost at Falador farm. You've got an increased chance of finding a clue scroll
textByHash.e181dc03774c22d062e95a1a248e8638cee48fe1: Well, there are four different shields of Falador, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too... which tier of rewards would you like to
textByHash.e67e3e68664b1d01e3b021741af82f00d2a658aa: higher level ores from cleaning Pay-dirt.
textByHash.eba6b4651324d636798db2f2c577177d75ecb1d3: from a Guard and can access a shortcut within the Motherlode Mine.
